holdings.infoBox: AMZA is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Energy Transfer LP stock at 16.59%, Plains All American Pipeline at 14.35%, Sunoco LP at 13.90%, MPLX LP at 12.16%, and Enterprise Products Partners at 11.95%.

overview.description: The InfraCap MLP ETF (AMZA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund is a complex, actively managed fund that invests in midstream MLPs that collect, process, store, or transport energy products. Structured as a C-corporation, the ETF pays taxes at the fund level. AMZA was launched on Oct 7, 2014 and is issued by InfraCap.

data.title: Real Assets or Active ETFs? Where RIAs Allocate
data.text: Registered investment advisors did not pull back on exchange-traded funds in the first quarter of 2026. They kept adding them, according to AdvizorPro's Q1 2026 Quarterly RIA ETF Trends Report.
